HowToApply.name: How to Apply for Hong Kong Offer Shares
HowToApply.requirements: [KG-derived placeholder — refine manually] Describes the process for investors to apply for Hong Kong Offer Shares using an electronic application process.
HowToApply.kg_function: Describes the process for investors to apply for Hong Kong Offer Shares using an electronic application process.
HowToApply.kg_purpose: Exchange requires this section to ensure transparency and standardization in the application process for Hong Kong Offer Shares, providing clear instructions to investors on how to participate in the offering. This section helps protect investor rights and ensures compliance with regulatory requirements.

kg_typical_structure.description: Highlights the fully electronic application process and provides contact information for inquiries.
Details the methods through which investors can apply for Hong Kong Offer Shares, including online platforms and CCASS services.
Outlines the steps involved in applying for Hong Kong Offer Shares, including payment deadlines and verification processes.
Describes how and when investors will be informed of the outcome of their applications, including allocation of shares and refund of application monies.
Explains how personal data will be handled and protected during the application process.

kg_writing_rules: Use clear and concise language.
Mention all relevant application channels and procedures.
Include contact information for inquiries and support.
Ensure all dates and times are accurate and up-to-date.
Cross-reference with other sections of the prospectus as needed.

kg_required_input_fields.description: List of application channels available for investors.
kg_required_input_fields.example: HK eIPO White Form service, HKSCC EIPO channel

kg_required_input_fields.description: Start date of the application period.
End date of the application period.
Deadline for completing full payment of application monies.
Contact details for inquiries and support.
kg_required_input_fields.example: +852 2862 8558, www.eipo.com.hk

kg_evidence_types: Prospectus registration with the Registrar of Companies
kg_common_pitfalls: Failing to update dates and times accurately.
Omitting critical application channels or procedures.
Neglecting to include confidentiality and data protection measures.
Not providing sufficient contact information for inquiries.
HowToApply.fallback_if_missing_data: Insert bracketed placeholder [●] and flag the item as a missing input for human review (do not hallucinate).
HowToApply.section_function: Application procedure manual for the Hong Kong Offer Shares.
mandatory_subsections: 1. How to apply — application channels; printed forms availability; electronic prospectus websites; eIPO/HKSCC/CCASS/FINI
2. Who can apply — eligibility; Hong Kong identity/address/legal capacity; restrictions on U.S. persons if applicable
3. Who cannot apply — existing shareholders; Directors/chief executive; close associates; connected persons; International Offering participants; persons prohibited unless waiver/consent
4. Application channels — HK eIPO White Form; Yellow Form if applicable; HKSCC EIPO / CCASS; broker/custodian; target investors; deadline and payment
5. Application amount and payment — board lot; application money table; maximum application; fees/levies
6. Multiple applications — one application per beneficial owner; duplicate rejection; double application restrictions
7. Bad weather / extreme conditions
8. Publication of results
9. Share certificates and refunds
10. Personal data, if precedent includes
evidence_requirements: Generate from transaction timetable, registrar, receiving bank and application channel data.
negative_rules: Do not infer dates, URLs, deadlines or channels.
validation_checklist: Channels, deadlines and amounts match Important Notice, Expected Timetable and Structure of the Global Offering.

ImportantNotice.name: Important Notice
ImportantNotice.requirements: [KG-derived placeholder — refine manually] To inform potential investors about the importance of seeking independent professional advice if they have doubts about the prospectus content.
ImportantNotice.kg_function: To inform potential investors about the importance of seeking independent professional advice if they have doubts about the prospectus content.
ImportantNotice.kg_purpose: Exchange requires this section to ensure that investors are fully aware of the risks and complexities involved in investing in the company and to encourage them to seek professional advice. This section also disclaims liability for the accuracy of the prospectus and highlights important terms and conditions of the offering.

kg_typical_structure.description: States that the exchange and its affiliates do not take responsibility for the contents of the prospectus and disclaim any liability for losses arising from reliance on the prospectus.
Provides information on how to apply for shares, including minimum application amounts, payment details, and application processes.
Lists key terms and conditions related to the offer, such as the maximum number of shares that can be applied for and the expected offer price range.
Includes information about regulatory bodies involved in the offering and their disclaimers regarding the prospectus.

kg_writing_rules: Use clear and concise language.
Ensure all disclaimers are accurate and comply with Exchange regulations.
Cross-reference important terms and conditions with relevant sections of the prospectus.
Maintain a formal tone throughout the section.
Include all necessary information as required by Exchange guidelines.

Omitting important terms and conditions that affect investor rights.

ImportantNotice.fallback_if_missing_data: Insert bracketed placeholder [●] and flag the item as a missing input for human review (do not hallucinate).
ImportantNotice.section_function: Tells investors how applications are accepted: whether the process is fully electronic, where the prospectus is available, what channels can be used, and what minimum application amount applies.
mandatory_subsections: 1. Fully electronic application process / application process status — whether fully electronic application is adopted; whether printed prospectus or application forms will be provided; where the electronic prospectus is available; statement that the electronic version is identical to the registered prospectus
2. Application channels — HK eIPO White Form service; HKSCC EIPO / CCASS / FINI; broker or custodian instructions; White Form / Yellow Form only if applicable
3. Applicant instructions — minimum number of Hong Kong Offer Shares; board lot multiple; payment of maximum Offer Price plus levies; pre-funding requirement if applying through broker/custodian
4. Application money table — number of shares applied for; maximum amount payable; note on brokerage and levies; maximum application number
5. Intermediary reminder — brokers, custodians and agents must remind clients the prospectus is available online
6. Cross-reference — How to Apply for Hong Kong Offer Shares

rules: Do not include physical form lodging deadlines; state no physical channel exists for public applications; include HK eIPO White Form and HKSCC EIPO / FINI.
If older-style physical forms apply: include White Form, Yellow Form and CCASS instructions; include physical lodging deadline and collection/dispatch rules.

table_requirements: Application money table (shares applied for; maximum amount payable including brokerage and levies).
validation_checklist: Minimum application shares reconcile with the board lot.
Maximum application shares do not exceed the allowed percentage of Hong Kong Offer Shares.
Amount payable calculation includes Offer Price, brokerage and all applicable levies.
Application channels match How to Apply.
